transcript: Country Store. May I help you?
Hey, this is Raymond. I’m a customer.
I was in there, ah, last night. You guys sold me the wrong chaw tobacco.
I need to get a refund and you guys said—
—I can’t give you any refunds or exchanges without a receipt.
I don’t have my sales slip; I lost it.
I can’t help you then, hon’, without a sales ticket—
—I just need a refund. I br—I’m in the river two, three days!
I can’t help that, baby! I can’t r—I can’t just swap it out because the inventory’s kept up through the registers.
—and without that receipt for the inventory, I can’t do it—
—you guys handed me the wrong thing! That’s not my fault. I made it out the door and I didn’t even realize that—what you had done!
So you had laid up—they—they rung it up and laid it on the counter and you didn’t realize ’til—’til today?
She held it behind the counter till I—my credit card went through and then when it was approved, then she handed it to me and I walked out the door!
—Didn’t know what was in your hand?—
—It was dark! What am I supposed to do up here?
Honey, we close at eight o’clock! it’s not that dark out then. [laughs]
Well, I had my glasses on. I don’t know what you want from me. I got a broken arm!
Well, I’m sorry, hon’ but without a—Like I said, hon’, I’m not—I’m not gonna keep the conversation going—
—because, like I said, without a receipt—
I got a broken arm and a broken neck. What do you want from me up here?
—do anything like that without a receipt!
I just wanna get an exchange or a refund; that’s all’s I need!
I can’t do an exchange or a refund without a receipt!
Oh, you guys are drivin’ me up the wall, here! I don’t know what you want me to do up here!
Well, I’m trying to tell you the way the process has to be and I’m sorry that you don’t like it but you have to have a receipt—
—Well, I—I got—I’m gonna bring a b—
—So without the receipt, hon’, I can not help you.
I’m gonna come up there with a bullwhip and straighten this out! What do you think of that one?
Well, you can go ‘head! I’ll be here all night if you wanna come up here!—
—I’m—that’s—I’m fine with that! I’ll tell you the same thing when you get up here!
I’m gonna bring a branch off a tree and start swingin’ it around if you don’t give me what I need!
You’re gonna bring a what—you’re gonna bring what and start swingin’ it, hon’?—
—are you threatening me? ‘Cause I’ll have the cops up here!
You wanna try again, give me a refund or what you gonna do up—
—No! I’m not gonna give you a refund—
—You’re not gonna give me a refund, dog gone!—
—without a receipt! And you’re not gonna keep get—You’re not gonna threaten me or I’m gonna call the cops and have you arrested right now!—
—I’m gonna come down there with the sheriff!—
—You come up here with a stick you’ll have to worry more about a goddamn broken back, you understand me?—
—I’ll come up there with a horsewhip!—
—Do you understand me? You come on!—
—Bring yo ass up here! Bring y’ass up here, motherfucker!—
—I’ll take a brick through the window. I’m gonna bring a brick—
—Bring it on up here! You’ll be a goddamn pussy if you don’t!—
—I’ll put a brick through the window!—
—Be a goddamn pussy! If you don’t show up, you’re a goddamn pussy!—
—So you bring that goddamn pussy ass on up here!—
I’ll call the sheriff and come up ‘ere! [exhales]
—Bring him on up here! Bring him on up here, motherfucker!—
—Bring him on up here, you goddamn ballless motherfucker! Come on!—
—I’ll meet—I’ll meet you at six o’clock!—

—Come on you [breaks up] fuckin’ prick! Bring your ballless motherfuckin’ ass on up here! Bring it on up here! You better bring more than a goddamn sheriff with you! Bring the goddamn fuckin’ army for all I give a fuck! Bring ya goddamn ballless cocksuckin’ ass on up here! I got somethin’ for ya motherfucin’ ass! I’ll be here all goddamn day and you’re a goddamn ballless fuckin’ pussy if your ass don’t fuckin’ show the fuck up!—
—I’m gonna bring a pipe up ‘ere and swing it around, you got me?
Go for it! Go for it ya ballless fuckin’ prick! Quit talkin’! Get ya ass on up here!—
—[breaks up] goddamn ballless ass up here! Quit talkin’ about it, motherfucker! You know where I’m at!—
—Hey, back it up, lady! Back it up!—
—Come on, then! You’re such a goddamn ballless prick, all you want to do is talk on the motherfuckin’ phone! You’re a goddamn ballless fuckin’ pussy!—
—So bring ya goddamn ballless fuckin’ pussy ass on up here!—
—I’m gonna call the sheriff down there!—
—Come on! Let’s see what the fuck you’re made of! See what the fuck you’re made of, motherfucker!—
—Hey, I want some tobaccy, and that’s all’s I need. I don’t need your lip, ya know what I mean?—
—Do it! Bring ya goddamn ballless ass on up here!—
—Quit talkin’! Let’s see what the fuck you’re made of!—
—I’m gonna spit the tobacco right on ya!—
—See what the fuck your ballless ass is made of you goddamn—
—Come on! Shut the fuck up and bring ya goddamn ass up here! Shut the fuck up and let’s see what the fuck you’re made of!—
—Come on! Come on, you goddamn ballless prick! You know where the fuck I’m at!—
—Come on! Go! Come on! I am ready for you!—
—You ain’t ready for me! You ain’t ne—
—Let’s see what the [breaks up] you’re made of!—
—You ain’t never gonna be ready for me, lady!—
—Come on! Bring ya goddamn ballless ass up here! Come on!—
—Bring ya goddamn ballless ass up here!
One-two-three, I’ll take care of you, you got me? ‘Cause I ain’t kiddin’ around here!
